title: Truck driver
what_we_offer: decent salary depending on the job, hard work and skills.
jobcontent:
We are now looking for hard-working C-Kortill Vaijeri-auto drivers in Kouvola.

A longer employment relationship is available for a motivated and reliable worker!

It is possible to start the work from 11.5 according to the agreement.

You are the person we are looking for if you have:

Work experience in the field

A valid c-card

Positive attitude, good work motivation

Fluent Finnish language skills.

Ability to drive various loaders a plus

We offer: A reliable working relationship,

decent salary depending on the job, hard work and skills.

Applications and inquiries: rekry@tstalotecs.fi

Applications by email: rekry@tstalotecs.fi

title: Helper for the maintenance of electric scooters
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: The work includes changing tires and other minor repairs.
Previous experience is not necessary, the job is taught on site. The most important thing is a careful and precise approach to work and the motivation to learn new things.
The working hours are generally between 12-18 and the position is perfect for someone who has the ability to quickly adopt new tasks and is handy with their hands.
The possibility of invoicing through your own company or business name.
job_responsibilities: Support workers in the construction industry
what_we_offer: Salary according to TES, which is determined according to your skills and experience
For the task of professional support and orientation
Were you interested? Fill out the recruitment form and tell us about yourself, we will contact you quickly!
More information about the job can be found on weekdays (9-15):
jobcontent:
We are looking for a helper for our client to maintain electric scooters.

The work includes changing tires and other minor repairs. 

Previous experience is not necessary, the job is taught on site. The most important thing is a careful and precise approach to work and the motivation to learn new things. 

The working hours are generally between 12-18 and the position is perfect for someone who has the ability to quickly adopt new tasks and is handy with their hands. 

The possibility of invoicing through your own company or business name. 

We offer you:

Salary according to TES, which is determined according to your skills and experience
For the task of professional support and orientation

Were you interested? Fill out the recruitment form and tell us about yourself, we will contact you quickly!

 

More information about the job can be found on weekdays (9-15):

Kalle Lindqvist, kalle.lindqvist@lavonia.fi

 

Lavonia Group, founded in 2008, is a strong domestic staffing agency in the construction and industrial sector. With us you can find the best jobs all year round. See other open jobs: <https://lavonia.fi/hae-toin/>

title: Chef
what_we_expect: comply with food-related health, safety, hygiene and other relevant legislation
work in a group in the tourism, accommodation or catering sector
control the quality of the food
hand over the cooking space to the next shift
jobcontent:
We need teammates who can keep the tools in hand and the package together even under pressure and the ability to work in a fast-paced atmosphere without forgetting humor. You are enthusiastic and able to meet customers also in the hall side in customer service tasks. Are you the person we are looking for..? We are looking for a person with work experience for a part-time employment relationship.

What do we hope you bring to the team?

- experience in the field
 
- passion for coarse food
 
- genuine customer-oriented attitude
 
- the ability to work in a team and independently
 
- you have good problem solving skills, you are quick under pressure and you have the ability to be precise in your actions.
 
- for the task, you need Finnish language skills, other language skills are considered an advantage.
 

What do we offer you? A challenging and versatile set of tasks - a good opportunity to develop - a large and experienced organization nice top professionals as colleagues from whom you learn and learn new things - an opportunity to develop your skills

How did it seem? Could you be our new colleague? Welcome to work in a nice team in the middle of flavors! Send your application with salary request, CV with attachments to rekrytointi@sauhu.bar. Don't wait, the place will be filled as soon as a suitable one is found! If you have any questions about what you do or about working for us, we will be happy to talk to you.

Inquiries: Johanna 0401580893, Kati 0407316423

www.sauhu.bar / www.sauhu.menu IG: sauhubistrobar FB: Sauhu Bistro & Bar

- Sauhu Järvenpää, Alankotie 1
 

Our Flame Burns For You (TM) No Rowing Without Fire (TM)

See job description

title: Element jointer
what_we_offer: decent salary depending on the job, hard work and skills.
jobcontent:
We are now looking for a hard-working ELEMENT SEAMER in Helsinki for versatile tasks starting on 4.5 at an apartment building site.

A longer employment relationship is available for a motivated and reliable worker!

It is possible to start the work from 4.5 according to the agreement.

You are the person we are looking for if you have:

Work experience in the field =

Demolition of the old seam, sanding of element seam gaps,_bottom taping of seams + priming_ Re-seaming

Preferably with a valid occupational safety card, other cards a plus.

Positive attitude, good work motivation.

Fluent Finnish language skills.

We offer: A reliable working relationship,

decent salary depending on the job, hard work and skills.

Applications and inquiries: rekry@tstalotecs.fi

Applications by email to rekry@tstalotecs.fi
